metadata.description: Comprehensive merged dataset of LeetCode problems from NeetCode 150, Blind 75, Grind 75, and Algomap with deduplication and enrichment
metadata.sortingDescription: Problems sorted in waves: foundational topics Easy first, then Medium, then advanced topics Easy/Medium, then all Hards. Within each wave, problems with more cross-references across source lists come first.
